utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: I am going to keep dating him Mother , and there is nothing you can do about it !

emotion_cause.span: 1_I am going to keep dating him Mother , and there is nothing you can do about it !

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: What are you going to do ? Kill him ? Like you did with Charles ? !

emotion_cause.span: 3_What are you going to do ? Kill him ? Like you did with Charles ? !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: That was a great scene ! And ... and ... and that slap looks so real ! How do you do that ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_That was a great scene ! And ... and ... and that slap looks so real ! How do you do that ?

utterances.speaker: Dina
utterances.text: Can I get some ice here ? !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh anyway , I just wanted to say how wonderful I think you are .

utterances.speaker: Cecilia
utterances.text: You are not the fan who dying are you ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No . No , I am Joey Tribbiani ; we did a scene together yesterday . I ... I am the guy in the coma !

utterances.speaker: Cecilia
utterances.text: Oh that was a real person ? !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: An ... an ... anyway I ... I just wanted to say that since I am getting your brain when you leave the show , I was wondering if there was any tips you can give me

utterances.speaker: Cecilia
utterances.text: I ... I ... I am leaving the show ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_I ... I ... I am leaving the show ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I do not know . Why ? Did you hear something ?

emotion_cause.span: 13_I ... I ... I am leaving the show ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh uh , one of the writers .

utterances.speaker: Cecilia
utterances.text: Which one ? Was it bald or was it tall ?
